basic_details.job_title: Tezpur University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Field Assistant, Junior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tezpur University has published the Project Staff Notification 2026 on the official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 5 Project Staff positions. Candidates within the age limit up to 28 years and holding qualifications such as M.Sc. with NET-JRF/NET-LS/GATE for JRF or B.Sc./Diploma for Field Assistant are eligible to apply through email mode. The application process will remain active up to 05 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.age_details: Max 28 years (Relaxable as per Govt. of India rules)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. with NET-JRF/NET-LS/GATE for JRF, B.Sc./Diploma for Field Assistant.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: M.Sc. with minimum 55% marks or equivalent CGPA in Environmental Science/Anthropology/Forestry/other relevant Biological Sciences/ Applied Sciences with NET-JRF/NET-LS/GATE. Desirable: Experience in survey techniques and data collection on bioresources utilization in traditional crafts of indigenous communities, and willing to undertake extensive fieldwork in different ethnic forest villages of Manipur. Experience of handling in remote sensing & GIS software, data analysis and interpretation. Field Assistant: Minimum qualification of B.Sc./Diplomas in relevant discipline of Biological Sciences/ Applied Sciences. Desirable: Experience in community-based fieldwork; knowledge of local languages and cultures; congenial in extensive field survey, working experience in different ethnic forest villages of Manipur, crafts specimen collection, storing, processing and preservation of specimens. Basic computation skill like, MS office, data compilation, file handling and office management.

salary_details.pay_scale: JRF: Rs. 37,000/- per month, Field Assistant: Rs. 20,000/- per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Tezpur University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Tezpur University Project Staff posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at Tezpur University?
faq.answer: Tezpur University is recruiting for a total of 5 Project Staff positions, including Junior Research Fellow and Field Assistant roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Junior Research Fellow?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Junior Research Fellow position, candidates must have an M.Sc. degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA in relevant subjects and must have qualified NET-JRF/NET-LS/GATE.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Staff positions is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Field Assistant post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Tezpur University Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications need to be sent via email to [email protected]. Ensure all required documents are attached in a single PDF file.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Staff positions at Tezpur University will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I attach with my application?
faq.answer: You need to attach your Curriculum Vitae (PDF file) and self-attested photocopies of all academic testimonials, proof of age, qualification, experience, and publications (if applicable) in a single PDF file.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for Tezpur University recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Important Links section provided in this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" heading.
